items.title: [CAUTION] Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz dominates the weekend tape, setting up…
items.content_text:
Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz dominates the weekend tape, setting up a geopolitical risk premium and crude-linked volatility for the Tokyo open. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1469; the hawkish Fed debut of Governor Warsh and a +145bp OIS carry advantage likely to maintain downside pressure. USD/JPY closed Friday at 161.28; while geopolitical risk are likely to support the pair on USD demand, the BoJ's July hike bias and a positive CESI (+17) would limit upside if haven flows pivot to JPY. NZD/USD faces a critical test at the open as the G10 laggard (1W avg: -0.792%) against a dominant USD (1W avg: +1.097%).

Key signals:
• NZD/USD — G10 Bilateral Theme + Geopolitical Risk: USD 1W outperformance (+1.097%) and NZD weakness (-0.792%) create a 1.889% G10 spread that favors further downside toward 0.5700. Iran's clo
• EUR/USD — Hawkish Fed Repricing + ECB Divergence: EUR COT net short -49.2k (37.4% long) aligns with the 150bp carry disadvantage to keep pressure on the 1.1469 Friday close. Hawkish Fed debu
• USD/JPY — Carry Advantage vs Squeeze Risk: JPY COT net short -115k creates significant short-squeeze risk despite the 275bp USD carry advantage and the pair's Friday close at 161.28.

items.title: [RISK-ON] Israel and Hezbollah's shaky ceasefire agreement is likely to weigh on USD/JP…
items.content_text:
Israel and Hezbollah's shaky ceasefire agreement is likely to weigh on USD/JPY at the open, while a hawkish Fed and RBA outlooks collide, setting up AUD/USD for potential gains. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1469; ECB's hiking stance removes near-term downside risk, but Fed-ECB rate differential would pressure EUR/USD. USD/JPY closed Friday at 161.28, and is likely to extend gains on geopolitical risk premium.

Key signals:
• NZD/USD — G10 Bilateral Theme + Geopolitical De-escalation: NZD/USD downside pressure intensifies as the USD leads G10 performance (+1.097% 1W avg) while NZD lags (-0.792% 1W avg), creating a 1.889% p
• AUD/USD — COT Crowded Long + CESI Divergence: AUD COT LF net long +38.1k (68.8% long) creates significant unwind risk as recent Australian economic data consistently disappoints with a C
• USD/JPY — JPY COT Short Squeeze + Yield Gap Resistance: JPY COT net short -115.0k (29.2% long) sets up a high-conviction squeeze risk as USD/JPY hovers near 161.28 following a fade in USD momentum
